fields.name: updateId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the address update request

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the customer associated with the address update

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the address update was requested

fields.name: department
fields.description: Department that originated the address update request

fields.name: targetDepartment
fields.description: Target department for the address update request

fields.name: updateType
fields.description: Type of address update (e.g., change, correction)

fields.name: previousAddress
fields.description: Previous address information for the customer

children.name: addressLine1
children.description: First line of the previous address

children.name: addressLine2
children.description: Second line of the previous address (if applicable)

children.name: postalCode
children.description: Postal code of the previous address

fields.name: newAddress
fields.description: New address information for the customer

children.name: addressLine1
children.description: First line of the new address

children.name: addressLine2
children.description: Second line of the new address (if applicable)

children.name: postalCode
children.description: Postal code of the new address

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the address update request (e.g., pending, approved)

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Priority level of the address update request (e.g., normal, high)
